repo.role: The workspace root IS the 'myTools' repo — it tracks canonical tools/ and workspace glue (workspace.json, CLAUDE.md, .claude/commands). App CONTENT (apps/*/{app,website,guides}) is git-ignored here; each lives in its own repo on its own toan* branch. Per-app tool copies (apps/*/tools) are ignored too — regenerate with sync-tools.mjs.

conventions.toolModel: Canonical tool lives in tools/<tool>; each app gets a synced working copy in apps/<app>/tools/<tool>. Edit canonical, then run tools/sync-tools.mjs.
conventions.identity: Every repo carries a CLAUDE.md whose first line states repo + branch + role, because the folder names have historically misled.

app-listing.purpose: Listing Studio — Shopify App Store listing graphics (Astro + Playwright). Skill: applisting-design.

user-guide.purpose: userGuideSnap — user-guide factory; captures a localhost app, renders annotated screenshots, publishes .mdx into each app's guide repo. Skill: guide.

guides.role: Astro docs/guide hub (publish target of the user-guide tool)

fork.note: personal fork of the app; NOT copied into ~/qdn — registered for reference only

legacyPaths._comment: Old flat ~/ checkouts, superseded by ~/qdn. Safe to DELETE once you've verified the copies.
legacyPaths.~/QSortby-website: → apps/qsortby/app  (the qsense monorepo; design-hub/ and .claude/ were intentionally NOT copied)
